title: Multiline TextField or Textarea React Component
excerpt:
Hi there, 
I am building an application that makes use of multiline textfield or textarea, I explored the documentation for TextField but it doesn’t support multiline so is there a component that supports multiline text …

posts.author: cokihim (Cohikim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I am building an application that makes use of multiline textfield or textarea, I explored the documentation for TextField but it doesn’t support multiline so is there a component that supports multiline text field or a Textarea ?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @cokihim and welcome to the community

That sounds interesting. Could you please send us an email to appsupport@monday.com with the exact flow and result you want to achieve so we can try to find the best solution for your specific use case?

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Cheers,
-Matias
